turns.user_message: My body feels heavy today, like I'm moving through thick water. I just don't have the energy for anything.
This heavy feeling hasn't lifted for days now, and everything feels muted. I can't seem to shake this constant dullness.
I'm completely numb, like my own skin is a weight I can't carry. Nothing gets through this fog, not even my own thoughts.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
